queries.question: List the animals we have in each zoo.
queries.sql: SELECT Animals.animalName  from Zoo_Animals join Animals on Zoo_Animals.animalID = Animals.animalID join Zoo on Zoo_Animals.zooID = Zoo.zooID   GROUP BY Zoo_Animals.animalID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Zoo_Animals.zooID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Zoo)

queries.question: List the animals we have in each zoo.
queries.sql: select zoo.zooname , animals.animalname from Zoo_Animals join Animals on Zoo_Animals.animalID = Animals.animalID join Zoo on Zoo_Animals.zooID = Zoo.zooID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?zooname ?animalname WHERE {
  ?zoo_animals a :Zoo_Animals .
  ?animals a :Animals .
  ?zoo_animals p:hasAnimals ?animals .
  ?zoo a :Zoo .
  ?zoo_animals p:hasZoo ?zoo .
  ?zoo p:zooName ?zooname .
  ?animals p:animalName ?animalname .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List the animals we have in each zoo.
